topics.title: Personal Income Tax
topics.summary: Progressive slabs 0% to 27.5%. Personal exemption EGP 20,000 annually. Individual Income Tax Law 91/2005 as amended.

topics.title: Social Insurance
topics.summary: Employees contribute 11% of insurable salary; employers 18.75%. Caps updated annually by NOSI.

topics.title: VAT
topics.summary: 14% standard rate. Mandatory registration above EGP 500,000 annual turnover. Schedule tax applies to specific goods/services.

topics.title: Annual tax return
topics.summary: Individuals file by 31 March following year-end. Employers file monthly payroll withholding on the 15th.
